runners.formComment: Jumped well at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished third at this track last start over 365m. Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Jumped well at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished third at this track last start over 365m. Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the home straight and again approaching the finish.

runners.formComment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by 0.8 lengths at Bulli over 340m (19.46) beating Midnight Fury in Grade 5 on April 7. Better off looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by 0.8 lengths at Bulli over 340m (19.46) beating Midnight Fury in Grade 5 on April 7. Better off looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the home turn hampered and galloped off the back.

runners.formComment: Has hit the frame at his last four runs, the latest finishing third in 20.88 at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Has ability and should run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has hit the frame at his last four runs, the latest finishing third in 20.88 at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Has ability and should run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels approaching the 630m boxes and moved out.

runners.formComment: Last start finished sixth in a Grade 5 on March 12 over 520m at this track behind Princess Ada, beaten 6 lengths (30.20). Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished sixth in a Grade 5 on March 12 over 520m at this track behind Princess Ada, beaten 6 lengths (30.20). Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 365m. Last start finished 3rd over 365m at this track beaten 2.25 lengths (21.25) behind Tiggerlong Sassy in a Grade 5 on April 6. Racing well and can find winning form again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 365m. Last start finished 3rd over 365m at this track beaten 2.25 lengths (21.25) behind Tiggerlong Sassy in a Grade 5 on April 6. Racing well and can find winning form again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the turn to the home straight and lost momentum.

runners.formComment: Should get a clear run from the wide draw. Wasn't impressive last start but does have a great record at this track and distance, rates among the chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Should get a clear run from the wide draw. Wasn't impressive last start but does have a great record at this track and distance, rates among the chances this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the back straight and lost ground.
In the home straight came together.
